enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on a Saturday, recapping seeing X-Men: Days of Future Past in 3D with his mom, helping her plant a rose bush, watching The Bible TV series at her house, and spending the day working on his website. He also mentions his audiobook listening habits and his cheap beer find at the liquor store.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Good movie with cool action; enjoyed it in 3D
Cheesy and too melodramatic; unfairly portrays Romans/Pontius Pilate as villains
Prefers listening to one book at a time repeatedly for retention, but admits he's too high to follow through strictly
Expanding beyond original simple scope to include time trials and a calculator; will be a lot of work but cool

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I forgot to do my vlog yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the liquor store to get beers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: They were having sales, and I got this beer for a dollar.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got three of these beers for a dollar.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wish I had gotten more because it's really good.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I called my mom up because I wanted to see the movie 'X-Men: Days of Future Past.'

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom took me to see 'X-Men: Days of Future Past' in 3D.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Whenever good movies come out, I have to see them in 3D.

claims.subject: Wolverine
claims.claim: Wolverine is a complicated character now because of the other Wolverine from the parallel universe.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Captain America is the man out of time, and Wolverine is the man from the parallel universe.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The movie 'X-Men: Days of Future Past' was pretty good with cool action.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I liked the character who can open up vortexes for people to jump through.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The fast-running guy in the movie was really cool.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The fast-running guy and the vortex-opening girl were in the end of the Captain America movie too.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't work yesterday because it was Saturday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working on my website in the morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom called me up to go over and dig a hole to plant a rose bush.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I watched a couple more episodes of 'The Bible' at my mom's house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The show 'The Bible' is too melodramatic and cheesy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The show 'The Bible' makes Pontius Pilate out to be a bad guy, but in the Bible, he was trying to save Jesus.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The Romans shouldn't be made out to be bad guys; it was the Jews.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was listening to the Bible every day, but then I listened to Elizabeth Keckley, who was Mary Lincoln's dressmaker and best friend.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Elizabeth Keckley was batshit crazy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I listened to the entire book by Mary Shelley's mother, a feminist.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The book was really fascinating.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wasn't into the voyage to the South Pole with Cook.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got into the idea of listening to the same book over and over again to really understand it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to listen to one side of the book review, but I'm too high to do it now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll just listen to a book once and then move on to the next one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did a nice little pass and go through a book a day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When you listen to the end sober, you pay more attention to the chapter titles and where it takes place.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm working on my website now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My internet sucks, and I can't watch YouTube videos half the time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I called my internet provider because it's supposed to be faster.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It doesn't matter because I can listen to my MP3s all day long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm working on my website, specifically one page that I like.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Originally, I wanted to make the website really small with drink ratio categories.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I decided to focus on speed and get people in time trials for a multi-other and one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Now the website will mold together, and I'll see if what people say on forums matches the time trials.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have a little calculator thing on the website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The website is going to be really cool but a lot of work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The website is going to be trippy to look at.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm trying to hammer through as much as I can today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been doing pretty good from night in the morning until now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got these beers and I'm going to go again because I have to work till nine.
